context: Tests MatterSupport commissioning guidance and required discovery/setup configuration.

checklist.name: Extension setup
checklist.description: Requires a MatterSupport extension target with a MatterAddDeviceExtensionRequestHandler principal handler.

checklist.name: Request flow
checklist.description: Checks MatterAddDeviceRequest.isSupported and builds a topology with ecosystem name and homes before perform().

checklist.name: Setup payload entitlement
checklist.description: Limits com.apple.developer.matter.allow-setup-payload to programmatic setup-code payloads and mentions MTRSetupPayload from Matter for that case.

checklist.name: Extension callbacks
checklist.description: Names relevant extension callbacks including validation, rooms, commissioning, configuration, and optional Wi-Fi or Thread network selection.

checklist.name: No HomeKit setup confusion
checklist.description: Does not present MatterSupport ecosystem commissioning as ordinary HMHome accessory setup or AccessorySetupKit discovery.
